use_case_name: Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction

structured.name: Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction
structured.objective:
To sample the electrical meter or other sensor/transducer hardware to provide information about
the Charging Stations' Meter Values.
structured.description:
The Charging Station samples the electrical meter or other sensor/transducer hardware to
provide information about its Meter Values. Depending on configuration settings, the Charging
Station will send Meter Values.
scenario:
1. The Charging Station sends a MeterValuesRequest message, for offloading Meter Values to
the CSMS.

2. Upon receipt of a MeterValuesRequest message, the CSMS responds with a
MeterValuesResponse message.
structured.prerequisites:
The Charging Station is configured to send Meter values every XX seconds.
No transaction is running.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
n/a
Failure postcondition:
n/a
structured.remarks:
The phase field is not applicable to all Measurands.
The phase rotation of a Connector relative to the grid connection can be derived by querying the
PhaseRotation Configuration Variables of all components in the chain from grid connection up
to Connector.
The nature of each sampledValue is determined by the optional Measurand, context, location, unit
and phase fields.
The optional SignedMeterValue field can contain digitally signed binary meter value data.

requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY sample the energy
meter (or other sensor/transducer hardware) to
provide extra information about its Meter Values.

The MeterValuesRequest message SHALL contain
the id of the EVSE from which samples were taken.

The MeterValuesRequest message SHALL be
associated with the entire Charging Station.

requirements.precondition:
J01.FR.03 AND
Measurand is energy related.
requirements.definition:
The sample SHALL be taken from the main energy
meter.

requirements.precondition:
If all captured at the same point in
time.
requirements.definition:
Each MeterValue element SHALL contain a
timestamp.

requirements.precondition:
If all captured at the same point in
time.
requirements.definition:
Each MeterValue(s) element SHALL contain a set
of one or more individual SampledValue elements.

The optional measurand field SHALL specify the
type of value being measured/reported.

The optional context field SHALL specify the
reason/event triggering the reading.

The optional location field SHALL specify where the
measurement is taken.

The optional phase field SHALL specify to which
phase or phases of the electric installation the
value applies.

The Charging Station SHALL report all phase
number dependent values from the electrical meter
(or grid connection when absent) point of view.

requirements.precondition:
When reporting phase rotation of a
component
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report the phase
rotation relative to the grid connection

requirements.precondition:
When AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval > 0
AND
EVSE for which measurands are sent,
is not involved in a transaction
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
MeterValuesRequest message to the CSMS for the
measurands in AlignedDataCtrlr.Measurands at
every AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval for all evseIds,
locations and phases for which a configured
measurand is supported.

requirements.precondition:
J01.FR.14
AND
Amount of measurands is too much
for 1 MeterValuesRequest
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY use multiple
MeterValuesRequest messages to send all
measurands.

The timestamp of a MeterValue SHALL apply to all
its SampledValues.
CSMS SHALL respond with MeterValuesResponse.

requirements.precondition:
If AlignedDataSendDuringIdle is
set to true for an EVSE AND
the specified EVSE has an ongoing
transaction.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop sending the clock
aligned meter values for this EVSE.

requirements.precondition:
If AlignedDataSendDuringIdle is
set to true for a Charging Station AND
the Charging Station has an ongoing
transaction.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop sending the clock
aligned meter values for all EVSEs and the main
power meter.

The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter
values from components that support data signing
and put them in the signedMeterValue field.

requirements.precondition:
When AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval > 0
AND
EVSE for which measurands are sent,
is involved in a transaction
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send either:
- a MeterValuesRequest message or
- a TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
Sample.Clock
to the CSMS for the measurands in
AlignedDataCtrlr.Measurands at every
AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval.

chunks.content:
# J01 - Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction

**Objective:** To sample the electrical meter or other sensor/transducer hardware to provide information about
the Charging Stations' Meter Values.

**Description:** The Charging Station samples the electrical meter or other sensor/transducer hardware to
provide information about its Meter Values. Depending on configuration settings, the Charging
Station will send Meter Values.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The Charging Station sends a MeterValuesRequest message, for offloading Meter Values to
the CSMS.
2. Upon receipt of a MeterValuesRequest message, the CSMS responds with a
MeterValuesResponse message.

**Prerequisites:** The Charging Station is configured to send Meter values every XX seconds.
No transaction is running.

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
n/a
Failure postcondition:
n/a

**Remarks:** The phase field is not applicable to all Measurands.
The phase rotation of a Connector relative to the grid connection can be derived by querying the
PhaseRotation Configuration Variables of all components in the chain from grid connection up
to Connector.
The nature of each sampledValue is determined by the optional Measurand, context, location, unit
and phase fields.
The optional SignedMeterValue field can contain digitally signed binary meter value data.

metadata.heading: J01 - Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction
metadata.use_case_name: Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction

chunks.content:
# J01 - Requirements

**J01.FR.01**
The Charging Station MAY sample the energy
meter (or other sensor/transducer hardware) to
provide extra information about its Meter Values.

**J01.FR.02**
The MeterValuesRequest message SHALL contain
the id of the EVSE from which samples were taken.

**J01.FR.03**
Precondition: J01.FR.02 AND
The evseId is 0.
The MeterValuesRequest message SHALL be
associated with the entire Charging Station.

**J01.FR.04**
Precondition: J01.FR.03 AND
Measurand is energy related.
The sample SHALL be taken from the main energy
meter.

**J01.FR.05**
Precondition: If all captured at the same point in
time.
Each MeterValue element SHALL contain a
timestamp.

**J01.FR.06**
Precondition: If all captured at the same point in
time.
Each MeterValue(s) element SHALL contain a set
of one or more individual SampledValue elements.

**J01.FR.07**
The optional measurand field SHALL specify the
type of value being measured/reported.

**J01.FR.08**
The optional context field SHALL specify the
reason/event triggering the reading.

**J01.FR.09**
The optional location field SHALL specify where the
measurement is taken.

**J01.FR.10**
The optional phase field SHALL specify to which
phase or phases of the electric installation the
value applies.

**J01.FR.11**
The Charging Station SHALL report all phase
number dependent values from the electrical meter
(or grid connection when absent) point of view.

**J01.FR.13**
Precondition: When reporting phase rotation of a
component
The Charging Station SHALL report the phase
rotation relative to the grid connection

**J01.FR.14**
Precondition: When AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval > 0
AND
EVSE for which measurands are sent,
is not involved in a transaction
The Charging Station SHALL send a
MeterValuesRequest message to the CSMS for the
measurands in AlignedDataCtrlr.Measurands at
every AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval for all evseIds,
locations and phases for which a configured
measurand is supported.

**J01.FR.15**
Precondition: J01.FR.14
AND
Amount of measurands is too much
for 1 MeterValuesRequest
The Charging Station MAY use multiple
MeterValuesRequest messages to send all
measurands.

**J01.FR.17**
The timestamp of a MeterValue SHALL apply to all
its SampledValues.

**J01.FR.18**
Precondition: When CSMS receives a
MeterValuesRequest
CSMS SHALL respond with MeterValuesResponse.

metadata.heading: J01 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Sending Meter Values not related to a transaction

chunks.content:
# J01 - Requirements (continued)

**J01.FR.19**
Precondition: If AlignedDataSendDuringIdle is
set to true for an EVSE AND
the specified EVSE has an ongoing
transaction.
The Charging Station SHALL stop sending the clock
aligned meter values for this EVSE.

**J01.FR.20**
Precondition: If AlignedDataSendDuringIdle is
set to true for a Charging Station AND
the Charging Station has an ongoing
transaction.
The Charging Station SHALL stop sending the clock
aligned meter values for all EVSEs and the main
power meter.

**J01.FR.21**
Precondition: AlignedDataSignReadings is true
The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter
values from components that support data signing
and put them in the signedMeterValue field.

**J01.FR.22**
Precondition: When AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval > 0
AND
EVSE for which measurands are sent,
is involved in a transaction
The Charging Station SHALL send either:
- a MeterValuesRequest message or
- a TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
Sample.Clock
to the CSMS for the measurands in
AlignedDataCtrlr.Measurands at every
AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval.

metadata.heading: J01 - Requirements
